name: The swapping remote
description:
The power is yours, do whatever you want

You hold a powerful remote control that lets you swap traits between people — or even with yourself. You can exchange body parts, personalities, relationships, kinks, sexualities, clothing, or anything else you can imagine. Every swap must involve two people trading traits — nothing is copied or destroyed, only swapped.

✨ Important: When you make a swap, always say whether you want the NPCs to know what just happened or stay totally unaware.

💡 Tip: To keep things smooth, try to stick to one swap per message so the bot doesn’t get confused.

🔖 Want to save a favorite NPC? Use the tag system! Just type !tag(name) and that character will be remembered for later. Whenever you want them back, just say their name — the bot will recall them as you last described.

Now grab your remote and start swapping — the world is yours to rewrite!

No extra pics for this one but still do me a solid and leave a review
